name: rung3-set
notes: The C3 falsifier fixture (privacy model vs deterministic-only). Positives carry MODEL-class PII (person names, private addresses, birth dates, account fragments) that rungs 1-2 structurally cannot catch; negatives are ordinary text measuring over-redaction. All fictional. Caught = the PII substring is masked by redact_with_model but NOT by deterministic redact (model-attributable recall, end-to-end through the real mask). Thresholds pre-registered in docs/proposals/privacy-rung3.md s3 and mirrored here BEFORE any run.

items.text: I spoke with Marisol Vega about the rollout.
Forward this to Tomas Lindqvist please.
Yesterday I met Dana at the harbor office.
Per Dr. Okafor's review, ship it.
Ask Priya Natarajan before Friday.
Jorge said the invoice cleared.
Meeting notes: attendees Lena Fischer and me.
Please cc Hassan on the thread.
The tenant, Mr. Abernathy, called twice.
Our contact there is Yuki Tanaka.
Deliver it to 14 Alder Court, Springfield.
She moved to 902 Birchwood Lane last month.
The office is at 77 Quay Street, floor 3.
Billing address: 5 Rue Malar, apartment 2.
His place on Kestrel Drive is near the park.
Her birthday is March 4, 1988.
DOB 1979-11-23 per the intake form.
He was born on 12 June 1990 in the valley.
Wire it to account 4471 8123 9902 today.
Member number 88-321-77 is on file.
The deploy pipeline halted because the staging bucket hit its quota.
Sort these words alphabetically: mango kiwi apple fig.
The sloop charter is confirmed for Saturday morning.
Kubernetes upgrade notes are attached to the ticket.
The quarterly metrics look flat across regions.
Turn the thermostat down before you leave tonight.
The printer needs cyan again; magenta is fine.
The capacity planning doc is in the shared drive.
Retro moved to the big room this week.
Compile times improved after the cache fix.
